title: Text-Based Emotion Detection
description: Text-based emotion detection task requiring annotators to classify the primary emotion in text and identify expression characteristics such as explicitness, sarcasm, and mixed emotions. Based on SemEval-2025 Task 11.

    year = "2025",
    publisher = "Association for Computational Linguistics"
